# Cinema Bankruptcy Simulator - English Edition

## Version: v2.0.0 English Edition
## Build Date: 2026-03-13

## 🎮 Game Description
Cinema Bankruptcy Simulator is a business simulation game where you manage a cinema and try to avoid bankruptcy while maximizing profits.

## 🌟 Features
- Fully English UI
- Western naming conventions
- Custom modal dialogs
- Responsive design

## 📦 Installation
1. Extract the zip file
2. Open `index.html` in your browser

## 🎉 Enjoy!
